ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "iso_code" TEXT /* Unique ISO code for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region in which the country is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertility_rates" (
  "fertility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertility rate entry */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the fertility rate is recorded */,
  "fertility_rate" TEXT /* Fertility rate classification (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "fertility_rate_value" REAL /* Actual fertility rate value */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the fertility rate data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fertility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertility_rates_iso_code FOREIGN KEY ("iso_code") REFERENCES countries ("iso_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_statistics" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population statistic entry */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the population statistics are recorded */,
  "total_male_population" INTEGER /* Total male population for the year */,
  "total_female_population" INTEGER /* Total female population for the year */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population for the year */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population count */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population count */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_statistics_iso_code FOREIGN KEY ("iso_code") REFERENCES countries ("iso_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., fertility rates, population statistics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_iso_code FOREIGN KEY ("iso_code") REFERENCES countries ("iso_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic, trend analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
